validation.multipleSpaces: Please use a single space between words.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.maxLength: Please enter no more than {{max}} characters.
validation.surnameRequired: Please provide both first and last name.
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.nameInvalid: Name may contain letters, spaces, apostrophes, and hyphens only.
validation.dateInFuture: Date cannot be in the future.
validation.minAge: Customer must be at least {{min}} years old.
validation.maxAge: Customer age must be no more than {{max}}.
validation.limitMismatch: Daily limit must be less than monthly limit.
validation.nationalIdNumeric: National ID must contain digits only.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.server: A system error occurred. Please try again later.

web3.title: Web3 Risk & Compliance
web3.subtitle: Read-only on-chain wallet risk intelligence to inform a KYC decision

context.title: Customer context
context.subtitle: The customer whose declared wallet you are screening

operator.title: Operator wallet
operator.subtitle: Optional — connect your own wallet for an audit attestation
operator.signatureHint: Signature only — no transaction, no custody, no private keys.

wallet.notFound: No browser wallet detected. Read-only screening still works.
wallet.error: Could not connect to the wallet.

screen.title: Screened wallet address
screen.subtitle: Pre-filled with a real public sample address. Paste any address to screen it.
screen.invalid: Enter a valid 0x address (40 hex characters).
screen.checksumNote: Format check only — full EIP-55 checksum is out of scope.

facts.title: On-chain facts
facts.subtitle: Live, key-free JSON-RPC reads from the configured node
facts.error: Could not read on-chain data right now. Please try again.

risk.title: Risk intelligence
risk.subtitle: Deterministic demo signals derived from the address

sim.providers: Real screening would call Chainalysis / TRM Labs / OFAC. These signals are simulated demo data, not live AML intelligence.

explanation.template: Heuristic assessment: {{count}} signal(s) flagged ({{list}}). Recommended action: {{decision}}. (rule-based)

vc.title: Verifiable credential (concept preview)
vc.subtitle: Illustrative W3C VC. No real cryptographic verification is performed.
vc.flow: In production: issuer signs → holder stores → verifier checks the proof. No PII goes on-chain.

record.title: Compliance decision
record.subtitle: Record your recommendation for this screening

web3.signMessage: Fintech Ops compliance audit — screening wallet {{address}}
